title: Serene Cyclopes Mod
description: This vanilla+ mod includes even MORE Cyclops variants, but this time, they are PEACEFUL!!! Although they are passive and do not fight back, they were designed specifically to have their own place in the Minecraft ecosystem. - MOD HAS BEEN MERGED
body:
This mod is intended to be used in addition to my [Savage Cyclopes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-cyclopes-mod), and is kept as a separate file because it has a slightly easier/simpler experience. However, this mod WILL work on its own, so feel free to use it with its companion, in a modpack, or as a standalone mod.  If you want a little more of a challenge, I recommend trying my [Savage Cyclopes Mod - Nether & End edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/savage-cyclopes-mod-nether-end-edition).

This mod adds several new features to the Savage Cyclopes Experience.

The **Mushroom Cyclops** is a new entity that spawns on the Mushroom Island.  You can shear it to get its Large Mushroom (elaborated on in the items section), and can bonemeal it to expedite   the mushroom's regrowth.  You can strike it with lightning to turn it into a Brown Mushroom Cyclops.

The **Cyclops Merchant** is similar to the wandering trader.  However, this creature's trades are **NOT COMPLETE RIP-OFF GARBAGE** which is actually the primary difference between this entity and the wanderiong trader (also this mob is EXTREMELY rare).

**Large Mushrooms** are a new Item that can be obtained by Shearing a Mushroom Cyclops (technically they are also obtainable by killing them, but the cyclopes are rare, and shearing them is renewable source).  They come in two variants, red and brown.  Large Red Mushrooms are obtainable by shearing Red Mushroom Cyclopes, and Large Brown Mushrooms are obtainable by breaking diamond ore with your fist. Just kidding.  They are obtained by shearing Brown Mushroom Cyclopes. Depending on the type, they have a small chance to give you Strength or Speed for a short duration.

**Gold-Infused Mushrooms** are crafted by surrounding a Large Mushroom in Gold Ingots (similar to a golden apple).  Depending on what mushroom they are crafted with, they can give Strength and Haste, or Resistance and Speed.

**Enchanted Golden Mushrooms** are crafted by combining a Gold-Infused red Mushroom and a Gold-Infused Brown Mushroom.  They give Strength, Speed, Haste, and Resistance.  They are similar to Enchanted Golden Apples, but are geared more towards offensive combat than defensive combat, as instead of Absorption and Regeneration, they give Strength and Speed.

**MORE FEATURES COMING SOON**

**THANK YOU**

I hope that you enjoy this mod, whether you play it alone ar with others, and whether you play it by itself or with other mods in a modpack.

Also: A lot of people have called me out on spelling "Cyclopes" wrong. I want to clarify that "Cyclops" with no "e" is a singular noun, and "Cyclopes" with an "e" is a plural noun.  **GOOGLE IT.**
